_meta.description: Individual executive and donor records for personal FEC contribution tracking. Separate from corporate PAC data in entities.json.
_meta.source: FEC bulk individual contributions (by_date files) for donor ranking and hydration, with committee metadata joined from local cm master files.
_meta.methodology: Ranked from FEC bulk individual-contribution files by normalized donor key across selected cycles; people-first matching checks donor names, common names, and exact employer aliases before preserving any existing hydrated Schedule A summaries, aliases, and entity links. Curated person-to-entity overrides come from scripts/data/people-entity-overrides.json; unresolved high-priority cases belong in tools/fec-bulk/reports/people-entity-review-queue.json.
_meta.partyResolutionMethod: committee.party when present, then curated committee-id overrides for obvious partisan PACs, then limited committee-name overrides for ACTBLUE/WINRED.

blackstone.notes: Blackstones official bio identifies Schwarzman as Chairman, CEO and Co-Founder and says he has been involved since founding in 1985.

renaissance-technologies.notes: Jim Simons founded Renaissance Technologies in 1982; mark historical after his 2024 death.

simon-property-group.role: Former Senior Vice President & Family Shareholder

td-ameritrade.notes: Joe Ricketts founded Ameritrade/TD Ameritrade and Forbes reported the Ricketts family owned just under 12% before the Charles Schwab acquisition; mark historical because Schwab acquired TD Ameritrade in 2020 and the platform shut down in 2024.

bigelow-aerospace.notes: Bigelow Aerospace's official 'Who We Are' page identifies Robert T. Bigelow as the company's founder and president and dates the founding to 1999.

pritzker-group.notes: Official Pritzker Group materials describe J.B. Pritzker as Pritzker Group managing partner and say the firm has operated since 1996.

jw-childs-associates.notes: The official J.W. Childs Associates team page says John W. Childs is Chairman of the firm he founded in 1995.

baupost-group.notes: Baupost's official About and Team pages identify Seth Klarman as CEO & Portfolio Manager and say he has overseen the firm's investments since its 1982 inception.

disney.notes: Disney stated in December 2023 that Perlmutter owned more than 25 million Disney shares through Trian's proxy fight and described him as a former Disney executive.

fox-corporation.role: Former Murdoch Family Trust Beneficiary Household
fox-corporation.notes: Kathryn Murdoch is married to James Murdoch. Fox/News Corp announced in September 2025 that James and other departing beneficiaries would cease to be beneficiaries of trusts holding FOX or News Corp shares, so this is historical, not a current control link.

news-corp.role: Former Murdoch Family Trust Beneficiary Household
news-corp.notes: Kathryn Murdoch is married to James Murdoch. Fox/News Corp announced in September 2025 that James and other departing beneficiaries would cease to be beneficiaries of trusts holding FOX or News Corp shares, so this is historical, not a current control link.

netflix.notes: Hastings co-founded Netflix and remains executive chair until the June 2026 annual meeting; mark current for this April 2026 pass and review after the board transition.

stryker.notes: Jon Stryker is a billionaire heir to the Stryker Corporation fortune; the family wealth is tied to the medical technology company founded by Homer Stryker.

renaissance-technologies.notes: Marilyn Simons was James Simons spouse; Jim Simons founded Renaissance Technologies and remained tied to the firm until his 2024 death. Mark historical after 2024.

microsoft.notes: Connie Ballmer is Steve Ballmers spouse and Ballmer Group co-founder; Steve Ballmers Microsoft stake is reported as a material family wealth source.

stryker.notes: Pat Stryker is a billionaire heir to the Stryker Corporation fortune; Forbes identifies her grandfather as Stryker Corp founder Homer Stryker.

netflix.notes: Patricia Quillin is Reed Hastings spouse; Hastings co-founded Netflix, remained executive chair into 2026, and retains shareholder exposure even as he steps down from the board in June 2026.
